helpers.label: optimization_solver
helpers.instructions: Solve the Polyomino Mining optimization problem. 1. Define the state space of possible polyomino configurations. 2. Model the information gain (entropy reduction) for both 'drilling queries' (precise but expensive) and 'noisy aggregate queries' (imprecise but cheap). 3. Formulate the objective function to minimize total cost while ensuring the polyomino locations are identified with certainty. 4. Determine the optimal sequence of queries. 5. Provide the answer in the format: FINAL_ANSWER: <answer> and JUSTIFICATION: <justification>.
